name: mercury-local
description: Mercury local node — the owner's on-prem secrets app (alias→real-item map, vendors, POs). Runs fully locally on Windows; deploys nowhere. See docs/MERCURY_BRIEF.md §9.

scripts.build: npm run prisma:generate && npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p server/tsconfig.json --noEmit && npm --prefix client run typecheck
scripts.start: npm run prisma:generate && npm run prisma:deploy && npm run build:client && npm run build:server && node server/dist/launch.js
